prompt: I want to create a skill that helps me write git commit messages. It should analyze staged changes and generate conventional commit messages with the right type prefix (feat, fix, chore, etc). The skill needs to handle monorepo scopes and should include a script that parses git diffs. Can you create this skill for me?
assertions: A SKILL.md file exists in the output skill directory
The SKILL.md has valid YAML frontmatter with name and description fields
The name field uses only lowercase letters, numbers, and hyphens
The description includes 'Use when' trigger conditions
The SKILL.md body contains a numbered workflow or step-by-step instructions
A scripts/ directory exists with at least one Bun TypeScript script (.ts file)
The script includes a --help flag or usage documentation
An evals/evals.json file exists with at least 2 test cases
The SKILL.md body includes a Common mistakes or pitfalls section
The SKILL.md body is under 500 lines
The script uses structured JSON output to stdout
